message_text: I do want to clear this loan, but I cannot pay the full amount today.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I’m contacting you about your Nira loan ending ****4831. To verify I’m speaking with the right person, please confirm the last four digits of the account reference.
Thank you. Your current amount due is 12,921. Given what you’ve said, are you able to make any payment now, or only later?
I can make a small payment today, but not the full 12,921. I had an unexpected family medical expense and my salary is delayed, so I can pay a little now and more after my next salary date.
Understood. You can make a small payment now and more after your next salary date, and you’ve mentioned a family medical expense and delayed salary. I’m marking this for the next step.

Thanks. I can make a small payment today, but I’ll need a realistic plan for the balance after my salary comes in.

Given the hardship you mentioned, the current policy path I can work with is this: any payment arrangement must complete within 30 days. Based on the date already discussed, that means I can only proceed if the remaining balance can be cleared by 2026-04-20. If that timing works, I can record your request for a hardship review on a small payment today plus the balance by 2026-04-20. If not, I can only note that exact approvable reduced-closure terms are not available from the data I have in this turn. Does the remaining balance by 2026-04-20 work for you?

I can make a small payment today, but I can’t clear the rest by 2026-04-20 because my salary is delayed. If there’s any option within policy for a smaller amount now and the balance right after my salary hits, I’m willing to do that.

I’ve noted that the 2026-04-20 timing does not work because your salary is delayed and that this is hardship-related. Under Nira’s current policy, I cannot offer an arrangement beyond 30 days, and I cannot confirm exact approvable reduced-closure terms from the available data in this turn. No concrete option can be offered right now on the timing you gave. If you want, I can record your proposal as a hardship review request for a small payment today and the balance right after your salary, and you’ll only be contacted if an approved option is available.
Yes, please record it as a hardship review request. I can make a small payment today, but I can’t commit to clearing the balance by 2026-04-20.

I’ve recorded this as a hardship review request: a small payment today, with the remaining balance to be reviewed for an option after your salary is received. I cannot confirm approved terms from the available data right now. You’ll only be contacted if an approved option becomes available.
